title: Amtech - 76mm Hole Saw, M35 High-Speed Steel Metal Hole Saw with 39mm Cutting Depth for Wood, Plastic, Metal Sheets, and More, Durable and Heat-Resistant, 4-6 Teeth Per Inch
features: VERSATILE HOLESAW: An effective holesaw with a cutting depth of 39mm for clean and accurate cuts through wood, plastic, metal sheets, and composite materials. A must-have hole drill bit for both professionals and home DIYers!

DURABLE: Made from M35 High-Speed Steel (HSS) with a black matt finish, the metal hole cutter, wood hole cutter, and tile hole cutter is heat-resistant and can withstand tough conditions with 4-6 Teeth Per Inch (TPI), ensuring a long-lasting performance.
ADJUSTABLE HOLE CUTTER: With a compatible 7/16” chuck, the hole saw drill bit easily fits most drills when used with the Amtech M1517 32-152mm hex arbour for added convenience.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure that our tools are reliable for any task. That’s why our hole saws are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The holesaw delivers clean and accurate cuts through wood, plastic, metal sheets, and composite materials with a cutting depth of 39mm. Made from M35 High-Speed Steel (HSS), this holesaw withstands high temperatures and tough conditions with 4-6 Teeth Per Inch (TPI), ensuring a long-lasting and reliable performance. The holesaw easily fits most drills when it’s used with the Amtech M1517 32-152mm hex arbour for added convenience.
